app.name: Matcha
app.one_liner: A powerful, feature-rich email client for your terminal built with Go and the Bubble Tea TUI framework.

screens.name: Main Email View
screens.purpose: Display inbox and email list with support for rich content and crypto status indicators.

screens.name: Plugin Marketplace
screens.purpose: Browse and manage community plugins directly in the TUI.

rust_commands.name: matcha_config
rust_commands.purpose: Configure an installed plugin via CLI.

rust_commands.name: matcha_install
rust_commands.purpose: Install a plugin from a URL or local file.

rust_commands.name: matcha_send
rust_commands.purpose: Send an email non-interactively, intended for use by AI agents or scripts.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add non-interactive send command for AI agent support
week 1: Implement core email viewing interface using Bubble Tea
week 1: Integrate basic plugin loading from registry
acceptance_tests: AI agent can successfully send an email using 'matcha send' with --to, --subject, and --body flags.
Image display fallback (e.g., Sixel in Zellij) is attempted when viewing rich emails.
User can browse and install a plugin via 'matcha marketplace' and 'matcha install' commands.
User can view email list with correct crypto status rendering without string concatenation performance issues.
